Summary: The Original Jet Black PlayStation 4 launched Sony's eighth-generation console, introducing a unified x86 architecture, an 8GB GDDR5 memory pool and the DualShock 4 controller. Its matte black finish became the signature look of the launch hardware.
The Glacier White PlayStation 4 offered the same launch hardware in a clean white finish and became one of the most widely available official colour variants.
The Gold PlayStation 4 featured a metallic gold finish and was released as an official retail colour option in multiple regions.
The Silver PlayStation 4 introduced a metallic silver finish and was released in select European markets as an official colour variant.
The Magma Red PlayStation 4 brought a vivid red finish to Sony's console lineup and was released as an official Japanese retail colour.
The Wave Blue PlayStation 4 offered a striking blue finish and was released alongside other official colour variants in Japan.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 4 Destiny Limited Edition Bundle
Summary: Released alongside Destiny, this limited edition PS4 featured exclusive artwork inspired by the game and is one of the earliest official PS4 themed bundles.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 4 Star Wars Battlefront Limited Edition Bundle
Summary: Released to celebrate Star Wars Battlefront, this limited edition PS4 featured Stormtrooper-inspired artwork and matching controller design, making it one of the most recognisable PS4 themed bundles.
The PlayStation 4 Slim redesigned the original console with a smaller, lighter and more energy-efficient form factor while retaining full compatibility with the PS4 library.
The Glacier White PS4 Slim offered the redesigned console in a clean white finish while maintaining identical hardware.

Edition Name: PS4 Slim Days of Play Limited Edition
Official Name: Sony PlayStation 4 Slim Days of Play Limited Edition
Summary: Released for Sony's Days of Play sales event, this limited edition PS4 Slim featured a steel black finish with a blue accent line and was available for a limited time.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 4 Slim 500 Million Limited Edition
Summary: Released to commemorate 500 million PlayStation consoles sold worldwide, this numbered limited edition PS4 Slim featured a translucent blue shell inspired by the original PlayStation and is one of the most collectible modern PlayStation releases.

The PlayStation 4 Pro is Sony's enhanced PS4 model featuring a more powerful GPU, support for 4K output and HDR gaming. It is designed to deliver improved visual fidelity while remaining fully compatible with the PS4 library.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 4 Pro Kingdom Hearts III Limited Edition Bundle
Summary: Released alongside Kingdom Hearts III, this limited edition PS4 Pro featured exclusive gold artwork inspired by the game and matching packaging for fans of the series.
